scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @domino-art/shared build && concurrently "pnpm --filter @domino-art/shared dev" "pnpm --filter @domino-art/server dev" "pnpm --filter @domino-art/client dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @domino-art/shared build && pnpm --filter @domino-art/server build && pnpm --filter @domino-art/client build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @domino-art/shared test && pnpm --filter @domino-art/server test && pnpm --filter @domino-art/client test
